prediction.reasoning: Based on DIS historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.6-1.9% daily), I applied a 2-day forecast model. The point estimate assumes a random walk with no drift. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with estimated 2-day standard deviation of ~2.7%, scaled appropriately for each confidence level (50%: ±0.67σ, 80%: ±1.28σ, 90%: ±1.65σ).
